name: midas-goa

metadata.name: midas-goa
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Lesser General Public License v2 (LGPLv2)
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: A MIDAS module for the grid operator agent.

documentation: # MIDAS Grid Operator Agent

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.meta
documentation:
This module contains the mosaik_api simulator meta for the
grid operator simulator.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.module
documentation:
This module contains the MIDAS upgrade for the grid operator
simulator.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.module.GridOperatorModule

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.module.GridOperatorModule.check_module_params
documentation: Check the module params and provide default values.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.module.GridOperatorModule.check_sim_params
documentation: Check the params for a certain simulator instance.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.module.GridOperatorModule.start_models
documentation: Start all models for this simulator.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.module.GridOperatorModule.connect
documentation: Connect the models to existing other models.
Grid operator upgrade module for MIDAS.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.simulator
documentation: This module contains the GridOperator simulator.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.simulator.GridOperatorSimulator

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.simulator.GridOperatorSimulator.init
documentation:
Called exactly ones after the simulator has been started.

Parameters
----------
sid : str
    Simulator ID for this simulator.
step_size : int, optional
    Step size for this simulator. Defaults to 900.

Returns
-------
dict
    The meta dict (set by *mosaik_api.Simulator*).

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.simulator.GridOperatorSimulator.create
documentation:
Initialize the simulation model instance (entity).

Parameters
----------
num : int
    The number of models to create.
model : str
    The name of the models to create. Must be present inside
    the simulator's meta.

Returns
-------
list
    A list with information on the created entity.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.simulator.GridOperatorSimulator.step
documentation:
Perform a simulation step.

Parameters
----------
time : int
    The current simulation step (by convention in seconds since
    simulation start.
inputs : dict
    A *dict* containing inputs for entities of this simulator.

Returns
-------
int
    The next step this simulator wants to be stepped.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.simulator.GridOperatorSimulator.get_data
documentation:
Return the requested output (if feasible).

Parameters
----------
outputs : dict
    A *dict* containing requested outputs of each entity.

Returns
-------
dict
    A *dict* containing the values of the requested outputs.
The GridOperator simulator.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_analyzer
documentation: This module contains the grid analyzer component.

functions.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_analyzer.rmse
documentation: Compute the root mean squared error.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_analyzer.GridAnalyzer

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_analyzer.GridAnalyzer.step
documentation: Perform a simulation step.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_analyzer.GridAnalyzer._eval_grid_state
documentation:
Calculate different metrics describing the grid state.

Currently, the average voltage p.u. is calculated.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_analyzer.GridAnalyzer.eval_observation_error
documentation: Evaluate the observation error if feasible.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_analyzer.GridAnalyzer.eval_voltage_violations
documentation: Evaluate possible voltage violations.
Grid analyzer of the grid operator.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.model.coordinator
documentation:
This module contains the coordinator for the subfunctions of
the grid operator.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.model.coordinator.Coordinator

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.coordinator.Coordinator.step
documentation: Perform a simulation step.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.coordinator.Coordinator.receive
documentation:
Receive a message.

The message is a dictionary containing three keys:
'from': (id of the source, e.g. '<sid>.<eid>'),
'topic': (context of the message, e.g., the attribute to set),
'msg': (content of the message, e.g., value to set)

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.coordinator.Coordinator.outbox
documentation: The message outbox.
Coordinator for all the subfunctions of the grid operator.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_observer
documentation: This module contains the observer of the grid operator.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_observer.GridObserver

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_observer.GridObserver.step
documentation: Perform a simulation step.

The observer model.

Runs the powerflow with currently known information.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger
documentation:
This module contains the Messenger, which handles
the communication stuff of the grid operator.

functions.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.is_input_from_unitmod
documentation: Check whether the given etype should be considered as input.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger.step
documentation: Perform a simulation step.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger.receive
documentation:
Receive a message.

The message is a dictionary containing three keys:
'from': (id of the source, e.g. '<sid>.<eid>'),
'topic': (context of the message, e.g., the attribute to set),
'msg': (content of the message, e.g., value to set)

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger.send
documentation:
Send a message.

The message is a dictionary containing three keys:
'to': (id of the destination, e.g., '<sid>.<eid>'),
'topic': (context of the message, e.g., the attribute to set),
'msg': (content of the message).

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger._read_inbox
documentation:
Read all messages from the inbox and wrap them into a
dictionary.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger._filter_messages
documentation: Filter the messages according to their purpose.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger._handle_entity_map
documentation:
Handle messages with destinations contained in the
entity map.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.messenger.Messenger._handle_unit_map
documentation:
Handle messages from unit models with grid as
destination.
Handles incoming and outgoing messages.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_forecaster
documentation: This module contains the forecaster of the grid operator.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_forecaster.GridForecaster

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_forecaster.GridForecaster.step
documentation: Perform a simulation step.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_forecaster.GridForecaster._run_forecast
documentation: Run the forecast for one step (*date*).

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_forecaster.GridForecaster._recommend_actions
documentation:
Analyze the results of the grid analyzer

Currently, only the over voltage case is handled.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_forecaster.GridForecaster._create_setpoints
documentation: Fill the actions dictionary will schedules.

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.grid_forecaster.GridForecaster._send_schedules
documentation: Unpack the actions dictionary an create messages.
The grid forecaster calculates future grid states.

modules.name: midas.modules.goa.model.load_estimator
documentation: This module contains the load estimator of the grid operator.

classes.name: midas.modules.goa.model.load_estimator.LoadEstimator

methods.name: midas.modules.goa.model.load_estimator.LoadEstimator.step
documentation: Perform a simulation step.
The load estimator class of the grid operator.
